chunks.text: In the Event of an Emergency - EECS at Berkeley In the Event of an Emergency Emergency Hotlines Campus phone or landline: 911 Cell phone: +1 (510) 642-3333 Building Safety Concerns For urgent Soda/Cory safety concerns (huge active leak etc) contact campus Facilities Management: +1 (510) 642-1032 For non-urgent Soda/Cory safety concerns submit an: EECS Safety Ticket Building Access Issues For after-hours Cory/Soda access issues, contact Facilities Services: +1 (510) 642-1032 For urgent Cory /Soda access issues during regular business hours, contact the: Cory Hall building manager: +1 (510) 384-8914 Soda Hall building manager: +1 (510) 704-3853 Contact Berkeley EECS In the Event of an Emergency View Open Faculty Positions
